completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: library (Rust plugin-coding-pack for Pulse ecosystem, 11 source modules)
Found 7 generated docs in docs/, README, PRD, 4 architecture specs, 4 epic specs, 70+ story specs, 2 test artifacts
Tech stack: Rust 2021 (MSRV 1.85) + pulse-plugin-sdk + serde + wit-bindgen 0.53 + reqwest 0.12 + tokio 1.40 + tracing + SQLite + Playwright 1.52 + BMAD v6.2.0

Exhaustive scan: read all 11 source files (5137 LOC), 3 Rust test files (1019 LOC), 7 dashboard test files, 12 workflow YAMLs. Found 18 pack actions, 3 HookPoint capabilities, 9 BMAD agents, 6 LLM tools, 7 dashboard pages, 21+ API endpoints, 16 JSON-RPC methods, 5 platform plugin delegations.
Source tree documented with annotated directory structure, 6 critical folders, 5 entry points, module dependency graph
Dev/deployment info extracted: install.sh, cargo test, Playwright tests, 3 env vars, workspace resolution, 4 dev patterns documented
Architecture doc updated — 243 lines covering 9 core components, 16 JSON-RPC methods, 18 pack actions, dashboard extension, WASM support, auto-dev loop
All supporting docs updated: project-overview.md (93 lines), source-tree-analysis.md (141 lines), development-guide.md (234 lines)
Master index generated with links to all 4 generated docs + 6 existing docs, no incomplete markers
Validation complete — 0 incomplete markers, all docs verified, 770 total lines across 5 docs

findings.project_classification: monolith, 1 part, Rust plugin library (cdylib + rlib + binary) for Pulse ecosystem with WASM support
findings.technology_stack: Rust 2021 (MSRV 1.85) + pulse-plugin-sdk + serde + wit-bindgen + reqwest + tokio + tracing + SQLite + Playwright + BMAD v6.2.0
findings.exhaustive_scan: 11 src modules (5137 LOC), 18 actions, 3 capabilities (ConfigInjector + ToolProvider + AgentDefinitionProvider), 9 agents, 6 LLM tools, 7 dashboard pages, 21+ endpoints, 5 platform plugin delegations
findings.key_changes_since_last_scan: Exhaustive scan (vs previous quick scan): full source code analysis of all 11 modules, complete test coverage mapping, detailed JSON-RPC dispatch table, module dependency graph, agent ACL rules, comprehensive dev patterns guide
